scenario: GitLab work session - audit the MergeRequest contract before a teardown rework

steps.name: Map the MergeRequest contract and what it is built on
Trace how a merge request is created and updated
Audit every dependent of the MergeRequest contract
Trace how merge request visibility and permissions are guarded
Assess the blast radius of the contract change

misses.detail: pre-MCP bypasses: 0, post-MCP verification reads: 31, post-MCP misses: 24 (diagnostic only — grep_count drives fluency)
